text.title: Methodologies Detail Failure Modes
text.summary: Antipatterns observed in real deployments of Methodologies Detail. Each ties a symptom to a root cause and a concrete fix.

antipattern.root-cause: Author copied from a non-canonical source.
antipattern.fix: Render via template that enforces canonical order; lint at audit pass.

antipattern.symptom: Only the valid example is rendered; negative case absent.
antipattern.root-cause: Author skipped invalid example to save tokens.
antipattern.fix: Audit pass rejects pages without an invalid example.

antipattern.symptom: Page references a validator script that does not exist on disk.
antipattern.fix: Audit pass runs `ls scripts/validate-<slug>.py`; fails if missing.
